title: Consulting Services Agreement
contract_text: Consulting Services Agreement between Globex and Initech Consulting.

clauses.text: Consultant shall provide the services described in Exhibit A.
Consultant assigns to Globex all inventions, works, and IP created during or related to engagement, including pre-existing IP used in deliverables.
Consultant shall not work for any competitor of Globex anywhere in the world for 3 years post-termination.
Consultant bears unlimited liability for any breach of confidentiality.
Globex shall pay Consultant within 60 days of invoice.
Either party may terminate for cause with 30 days notice.
